titleStmt.title: SII 41.14: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 14. (A.R. No. 14 of 1905.) Kīḻūr, Tirukkoyilur Taluk, South Arcot District.

summary.p: South wall of the maṇḍapa a in front of the central shrine in the Vīraṭṭāṉēśvara temple.
This incomplete inscription stops with citing the prasasti commencing with Tirumaṉṉi-vaḷara etc. of Rājēndra Chōḻa I

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumaṉṉivaḷara Irunilamaṭantaiyum poṟceyappāvaiyum cirttaṉic celviyum taṉperun=teviyarāki Iṉpuṟa neṭutuyilūḻiyu ḷiṭaituṟai nāṭun tuṭarvaṉa velip paṭarvaṉavāciyum cuḷḷic cūḻmatiṭ koḷḷi
p pākkaiyum naṇṇaṟ karumuraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum porukaṭaliḻattaraicar tam muṭiyum Āṅkavaṉ ṟeviyaroṅkeḻil muṭiyum muṉṉavar pakkal teṉṉavaṉ vaiytta cun=taramuṭiyum In=tiraṉāramum teṇṭirai Īḻamaṇṭala muḻuvatu
m Eṟipaṭaik keraḷaṉ muṟaimaiyil cūṭum kulataṉamākiya palarpukaḻmuṭiyum ceṅkatirmālaiyuñ caṅkatirvelait tolperuṅkāvaṟ palapaḻan=ti(y)vuñ ceṟuviṟ ciṉavi lirupattorukālaraicu kaḷaikaṭṭa paracurāmaṉ
mevaruñcāntimaṟ ṟivaraṇ karuti Iruttiya cempoṟṟiruttaku muṭiyum payaṅkoṭu paḻimika muyaṅkiyil mutukiṭṭoḷitta jayaciṅkaḷaṉaḷap perum pukaḻoṭum piṭiyiliraṭṭapāṭi yeḻairai Ilakkamum ṉavanetik kulap perumalai
kaḷum vikkiramavirac cakkarakoṭṭamum mutivaṭavallai maturamaṇṭalamuṅ kāmiṭavaḷa nāmaṇak koṇaiyum veñcilai virar pañcappaḷḷiyum pācaṭaip paḻaṉa mācuṇi tecamum Ayarvil
vaṇkirttiyāti ña(na)karavaiyiṟ can=tiraṉ tolkulattin=tirarataṉai viḷaiyamark kaḷattu kiḷaiyoṭum piṭittu palataṉattoṭu niṟaikulataṉak kuvaiyuñ ciṭṭaruñ ceṟimiḷai
Oṭṭa[viṣaiya]mum pūcurar cer ṉaṟ kocalaiñāṭun=taṉmapālaṉai vemmuṉaiyaḻittu vaṇṭuṟai colait taṇṭaputtiyum Iraṇacūraṉai muraṇurat tākkit tikkiṇa kirttit takkaṇalāṭa
mum kovin=tacan=taṉ māviḻintoṭac caṅkātaRead ‘taṅkāta’cāral vaṅkāḷatecamum toṭukaṭaṟcaṅkukoṭṭal mahi[ pāḷaṉai] veñcamar viḷākat tañcu vittaruḷi Oṇṭiṟal yāṉai
yum peṇṭir paṇṭāramum nittila neṭuṅkaṭal luttiralāṭamum veṟimalar tirttat teṟipuṉak kaṅkaiyum
alaikaṭal naṭuvuḷ palakalañ celutti caṅkirāma vijaiyortuṅka panmaṉā
kiya kiṭārattaraiyaṉai vākayum porukaṭaṟ kumpakkariyoṭu makappaṭutturimaiyil piṟa
kkiya perunetip piṟakkamu mārttavanaka nakarp porttoḻil vācalil viccātirato
raṇamu moyt toḷir puṉaimaṇip putavamum kaṉamaṇik katavamum niṟaicir vijai
yamum tuṟaiñīrp paṉṉaiyuṅ naṉmalaiyūreyiṟ ṟoṉmalaiyūrum Āḻkaṭalakaḻ cūḻ mā
ciriṭiṅkamum kalaṅkāvalviṉai Ilaṅkācokamum kāppuṟu niṟaipuṉalUnfinished
Digital edition of SII 41.14 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
